name: Codex CLI Task Runner
description: Async Codex CLI task runner for OpenClaw. Runs long-running Codex tasks in background via nohup with 60s heartbeats, crash-safe notifications, session resumption, and PID tracking. Multi-channel delivery via Telegram DM threads and WhatsApp. 752-line SKILL.md is one of the most thorough in the ecosystem.
review: Polished, production-quality skill that solves a real problem elegantly. The SKILL.md alone is one of the most thorough in the ecosystem. The async architecture (nohup + heartbeat + wake) is well thought out. Drax confirmed everything works.
